'''zhocharaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ategmic|ategmic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ategmic|ategmic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhocharaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhocharithi|zhocharithi]] || [[word:zhochariji|zhochariji]] || [[word:zhocharishi|zhocharishi]] || [[word:zhochariki|zhochariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhocharuthuthu|zhocharuthuthu]] || [[word:zhocharujuju|zhocharujuju]] || [[word:zhocharushushu|zhocharushushu]] || [[word:zhocharukuku|zhocharukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhocharuthu|zhocharuthu]] || [[word:zhocharuju|zhocharuju]] || [[word:zhocharushu|zhocharushu]] || [[word:zhocharuku|zhocharuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhocharufthuf|zhocharufthuf]] || [[word:zhocharufjuf|zhocharufjuf]] || [[word:zhocharufshuf|zhocharufshuf]] || [[word:zhocharufkuf|zhocharufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhocharethe|zhocharethe]] || [[word:zhochareje|zhochareje]] || [[word:zhochareshe|zhochareshe]] || [[word:zhochareke|zhochareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhocharothotho|zhocharothotho]] || [[word:zhocharojojo|zhocharojojo]] || [[word:zhocharoshosho|zhocharoshosho]] || [[word:zhocharokoko|zhocharokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhocharotho|zhocharotho]] || [[word:zhocharojo|zhocharojo]] || [[word:zhocharosho|zhocharosho]] || [[word:zhocharoko|zhocharoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhocharofthof|zhocharofthof]] || [[word:zhocharofjof|zhocharofjof]] || [[word:zhocharofshof|zhocharofshof]] || [[word:zhocharofkof|zhocharofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfthĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfjĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfshĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfkĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfthĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfjĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfshĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfkĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfthĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfjĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfshĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhocharĂŻfkĂŻf|zhocharĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhocharĂŠthĂŠ|zhocharĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhocharĂŠjĂŠ|zhocharĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhocharĂŠshĂŠ|zhocharĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhocharĂŠkĂŠ|zhocharĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhocharathatha|zhocharathatha]] || [[word:zhocharajaja|zhocharajaja]] || [[word:zhocharashasha|zhocharashasha]] || [[word:zhocharakaka|zhocharakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhocharatha|zhocharatha]] || [[word:zhocharaja|zhocharaja]] || [[word:zhocharasha|zhocharasha]] || [[word:zhocharaka|zhocharaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhocharafthaf|zhocharafthaf]] || [[word:zhocharafjaf|zhocharafjaf]] || [[word:zhocharafshaf|zhocharafshaf]] || [[word:zhocharafkaf|zhocharafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhocharasha|zhocharasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhocharshĂ«asha|zhocharshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhocharroasha|zhocharroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhocharmuasha|zhocharmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhocharyaasha|zhocharyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhocharnkshĂ«asha|gozhocharnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhocharnkroasha|gozhocharnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhocharnkmuasha|gozhocharnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhocharnkyaasha|gozhocharnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhochacharasha|zhochacharasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhochacharshĂ«asha|zhochacharshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhochacharroasha|zhochacharroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhochacharmuasha|zhochacharmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhochacharyaasha|zhochacharyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhochacharnkshĂ«asha|gozhochacharnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhochacharnkroasha|gozhochacharnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhochacharnkmuasha|gozhochacharnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhochacharnkyaasha|gozhochacharnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhechĂŠrasha|zhechĂŠrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhechĂŠrshĂ«asha|zhechĂŠrshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhechĂŠrroasha|zhechĂŠrroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhechĂŠrmuasha|zhechĂŠrmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhechĂŠryaasha|zhechĂŠryaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhechĂŠrnkshĂ«asha|gozhechĂŠrnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhechĂŠrnkroasha|gozhechĂŠrnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhechĂŠrnkmuasha|gozhechĂŠrnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhechĂŠrnkyaasha|gozhechĂŠrnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhochfarasha|zhochfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhochfarshĂ«asha|zhochfarshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhochfarroasha|zhochfarroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhochfarmuasha|zhochfarmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhochfaryaasha|zhochfaryaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhochfarnkshĂ«asha|gozhochfarnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhochfarnkroasha|gozhochfarnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhochfarnkmuasha|gozhochfarnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhochfarnkyaasha|gozhochfarnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
